raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_2 is positioned on top of box_1 with its left and right faces clear; no objects block the robot's arms from approaching the stack from the sides.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is securely held between both end-effectors and lifted slightly, removing the load from box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table area front-left of the original stack",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding box_2; the designated table area is free of obstacles and provides enough space for a 30 cm box.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is stably placed on the specified table area and released by the robot, leaving box_1 completely unobstructed."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 is now fully exposed on the tabletop; both lateral faces are reachable without interference from other objects.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 (the darker box) is firmly grasped by the robot's two arms and lifted off the table, accomplishing the pick-up task."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_2 is positioned on top of box_1 with its left and right faces clear; no objects block the robot's arms from approaching the stack from the sides.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is securely held between both end-effectors and lifted slightly, removing the load from box_1.

parsed_json.Target: table area front-left of the original stack
parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding box_2; the designated table area is free of obstacles and provides enough space for a 30 cm box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is stably placed on the specified table area and released by the robot, leaving box_1 completely unobstructed.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 is now fully exposed on the tabletop; both lateral faces are reachable without interference from other objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 (the darker box) is firmly grasped by the robot's two arms and lifted off the table, accomplishing the pick-up task.
